rationale: Educ. Code §25.082 governs pledges of allegiance and a minute of silence in schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value. No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district and the governing board of each open-enrollment charter school shall require students, once during each school day at each campus, to recite:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
